name: ExtensionTestScript_Origin_Url
title: R5: The url path of the origin server (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `TestScript.origin.url` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`TestScript.origin.url` 0..1 `url`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `TestScript.origin.url` 0..1 `url`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `TestScript.origin.url` has a context of TestScript.origin based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `TestScript`.
Element `TestScript.origin.url` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The url path of the origin server (new)
element.comment:
Element `TestScript.origin.url` has a context of TestScript.origin based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `TestScript`.
Element `TestScript.origin.url` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
If provided, the test engine is not expected to prompt for or accept external input of this value.

element.short: The url path of the origin server
element.definition: The explicit url path of the origin server used in this test script.
element.comment: If provided, the test engine is not expected to prompt for or accept external input of this value.
